jobs.title: Army Porter Akhnoor Vacancy 2026, Attend Porter Recruitment Rally
how_to_apply: First, download the official notification and read it carefully.
Check the eligibility criteria and required documents.
Go to the rally venue on the specified date and time.
Bring all original documents and photocopies.
Arrival time: Union Auditorium, Akhnoor, Jammu
Complete the physical test and document verification process.
jobs.jobs_info: Army Porter Akhnoor Vacancy 2026:The Indian Army will conduct the Porter Recruitment Rally from July 28, 2026, to July 30, 2026, at the Sangha Auditorium, Akhnoor. Selected candidates will be appointed for the period from September 1, 2026, to February 26, 2027. The total number of positions and salaries is not specified in this notice. There will be no online application process; instead, candidates will be required to appear directly at the recruitment site in their district on the scheduled date with all original documents.

vacancy_details.eligibility: District
Jammu District (Akhnoor, Arnia, Bahu, Bhalwal, Bishnah, Chowki Chora, Dansal, Jammu, Jammu North, Jammu South, Jammu West, Jourian, Khour, and nearby areas)
Jammu District (Maira Mandrian, Mandal, Marh, Nagrota, Pragwal, Ranbir Singh Pura, Suchetgarh) and Rajouri District
Poonch District, Other Districts of Jammu & Kashmir, and Candidates from Other States of India
10Th + Physically Fit

jobs.title: Haryana Roadways Driver Conductor Helper Recruitment 2026, Apply Online
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://hkrnl.itiharyana.gov.in/
Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage.
First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password.
After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable).
Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking].
Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors.
After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

jobs.jobs_info: Jal Shakti Vibhag Dharampur Circle Vacancy 2026: The Jal Shakti Department, Himachal Pradesh, has issued a recruitment notice for 30 Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker positions. Offline applications are invited for this recruitment. The deadline for submission is July 30, 2026, at 5:00 PM. Selected candidates will receive a monthly honorarium ranging from ₹6,000 to ₹7,100, depending on the position. Recruitment will be on a part-time basis, and selected candidates will be required to work six hours per day.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Candidate should have at least Matriculation (10th) with Certificate in the trade of ITI Electrician/Wireman/Diesel Mechanic/Pump Mechanic/Motor Mechanic/Pump Operator cum Mechanic from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th) with Certificate in the trade mentioned above/Income Certificate under Skill Development Scheme of Government and Candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe

Candidate should have at least Matriculation (10th) and ITI Certificate in the trade of Fitter & Plumber from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th)/Income Certificate along with Certificate in the above-mentioned trade under Skill Development Scheme of Government, and Candidates who belong to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe category should submit their category certificate (SC/ST).

Candidate must have a minimum qualification of Middle Pass or equivalent from a school recognized by the State Government/Income Certificate, and candidates belonging to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe category should submit their category certificate (SC/ST).

jobs.jobs_info: Bank of Baroda Churu Attender Vacancy Form 2026: If you’ve passed 10th grade and are looking for a job in a bank-related organization, this is a good opportunity for you. Baroda Swarojgar Vikas Sansthan (BSVS), Churu, a RSETI institute sponsored by Bank of Baroda, has released a notification for the post of Attender on a contractual basis. A total of 01 position will be filled under this recruitment. Interested candidates can submit applications offline until July 20, 2026, at 5:00 PM. Selected candidates will receive a starting salary of ₹14,000 per month, which can reach up to ₹19,000 per month with annual increases. If you meet the eligibility criteria, please apply before the deadline.

jobs.title: Northern Railway ATVM Facilitator Vacancy 2026, Apply Now
how_to_apply: Visit the official Northern Railway website at www.nr.indianrailways.gov.in or the link below.
Download the tender form and the document containing all terms and conditions.
Fill out the application form accurately with all the required details.
Submit your completed application in the designated tender box at the office by 10 August 2026.
Ensure the submission is made strictly between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM on the deadline date.

Applicants must provide a refundable security deposit of Rs. 50,000/- for NSG-1 and NSG-2 stations or Rs. Rs. 25,000/- for other categories, payable to the Sr. Divisional Finance Manager, Ambala Cantt, via Demand Draft, Fixed Deposit, or Money Receipt. This deposit is refundable upon contract completion after adjusting any pending dues, but it will be forfeited if the facilitator expresses an inability to operate the machine after being engaged.
